message:
feat(playbook): Add pre-add validation with --check and --strict flags

- Create rule-validation.ts with similarity, quality, and category checks
- Similarity: warns if >0.8 similar to existing rule (semantic search)
- Quality: word count, context words, vagueness detection
- Category: suggests better category based on keyword detection
- --check flag shows validation before adding
- --strict flag fails on warnings instead of adding
- Works with both single add and batch add (--file)
- 19 new tests for validation module

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"cass_memory_system-gyur","title":"[Semantic] embedText - Generate embedding vector","description":"Generate 384-dimensional embedding vector from text.

Implementation:
```typescript
async function embedText(text: string): Promise<number[]> {
  const embed = await getEmbedder();
  const result = await embed(text, {
    pooling: "mean",      // Average all token embeddings
    normalize: true        // Unit vector for cosine similarity
  });
  return Array.from(result.data);  // Float32Array → number[]
}
```

Input:
- Any text string (bullet content, task description, etc.)
- Automatically tokenized and truncated if too long
- Max tokens: 512 (model limit)

Output:
- 384-dimensional number array
- Normalized to unit vector (L2 norm = 1)
- Values typically in [-1, 1]

Performance:
- ~3ms per embedding (after model load)
- Can batch for efficiency

Use cases:
- Bullet content embedding
- Task query embedding
- Semantic search
- Duplicate detection","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"LilacHill","created_at":"2025-12-07T16:49:28.793899-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-13T04:31:43.553893-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-13T04:31:43.553893-05:00","comments":[{"id":17,"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-gyur","author":"jemanuel","text":"Generate 384-dimensional embedding vector from text.

```typescript
  });
  return Array.from(result.data);  // Float32Array → number[]
}
```

Input:

Output:

Performance:
- ~3ms per embedding (after model load)
- Can batch for efficiency

Use cases:

- Semantic search
- Duplicate detection","created_at":"2025-12-07T23:15:50Z"}]}

 {"id":"cass_memory_system-h4zk","title":"[Testing:Unit] curator.test.ts - Deterministic curation tests","description":"Test cases:
- handleAddDelta: adds new, skips duplicates
- handleHelpfulDelta: records event, checks promotion
- handleHarmfulDelta: records event with reason
- detectConflicts: finds contradictory rules
- invertToAntiPattern: correct transformation
- autoInvertHarmfulBullets: threshold-based inversion","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-07T16:49:35.79888-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-08T12:48:28.816285-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-08T12:48:28.816285-05:00"}
-{"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y","title":"Enhanced Agent-Native Onboarding v2","description":"# Epic: Enhanced Agent-Native Onboarding v2

## Background & Context

The `cm onboard` command (added in bcac363) provides agent-native onboarding - a workflow where the coding agent itself extracts rules from cass sessions, eliminating the need for expensive LLM API calls. This is "free" when using Claude Max or GPT Pro since the agent is already paid for.

**Current State (v1):**
- `--status`: Check onboarding status
- `--sample`: Sample diverse sessions for analysis  
- `--read <path>`: Export session content for agent
- `--prompt`: Show extraction instructions
- `--guided`: Full guided flow

**Key Problems:**
1. No progress tracking - can't resume across sessions
2. Must add rules one-by-one via repeated commands
3. Blind sampling - doesn't consider playbook gaps
4. No validation - easy to add duplicates
5. Generic guidance regardless of playbook state

## Goals

1. Reduce friction: Batch add rules, track progress
2. Smarter sampling: Fill gaps in playbook coverage
3. Quality gates: Catch duplicates before adding
4. Targeted focus: Let agents focus on specific areas
5. Better guidance: Context-aware extraction templates

## Non-Goals (Cut)

- Impact preview (use existing cm stats)
- Cross-session pattern detection (agent does this better)
- LLM-based analysis (defeats "no API cost" purpose)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:32:05.296587-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T10:32:23.710692-05:00"}

 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1","title":"Onboarding Progress Tracking","description":"Track which sessions have been analyzed to enable resumable onboarding across agent sessions.

## Problem
No memory of which sessions have been analyzed. If agent context fills mid-onboarding, they must start over.

## Solution
State file at ~/.cass-memory/onboarding-state.json tracking:
- Processed sessions (by path)
- Rules extracted count
- Timestamps

## Acceptance Criteria
- --status shows progress stats
- --sample excludes processed sessions
- --mark-done marks session without adding rules
- --reset clears progress
- --include-processed overrides exclusion","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:34:46.320157-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.435427-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.435427-05:00","labels":["foundation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:34:46.320662-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.1","title":"Implement onboarding state persistence","description":"Create state management for tracking onboarding progress.

## State Schema
```json
{
  "version": 1,
  "startedAt": "ISO8601",
  "lastUpdatedAt": "ISO8601",
  "processedSessions": [
    {"path": "string", "processedAt": "ISO8601", "rulesExtracted": number}
  ],
  "stats": {"totalSessionsProcessed": number, "totalRulesExtracted": number}
}
```

## Functions to Implement
1. loadOnboardState() - Read file, return default if missing
2. saveOnboardState() - Atomic write (temp file + rename)
3. markSessionProcessed(path, rulesExtracted) - Add to list, update stats
4. isSessionProcessed(path) - Check if in list
5. resetOnboardState() - Delete file

## File Location
~/.cass-memory/onboarding-state.json

## Considerations
- Atomic write prevents corruption on crash
- Version field enables future schema migrations
- Stats derived from processedSessions for consistency
- Handle corrupted JSON gracefully (warn + return empty)

## Files to Create/Modify
- src/onboard-state.ts (new) - State management
- src/commands/onboard.ts - Import and use","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":90,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:31.437384-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T10:47:40.057704-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T10:47:40.057704-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:31.437841-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.2","title":"Integrate progress into sample and status","description":"Connect state management to --sample and --status commands.

## --status Changes
Add progress section to output:
```json
{
  "status": {...},
  "progress": {
    "sessionsProcessed": 5,
    "rulesExtracted": 15,
    "startedAt": "...",
    "lastActivity": "..."
  }
}
```

## --sample Changes
1. Load state on startup
2. Filter out processed sessions from results
3. Show "X sessions remaining" in output
4. Add --include-processed flag to override

## Human Output
```
ONBOARDING STATUS
  Progress: 5 sessions analyzed, 15 rules extracted
  Started: 2 hours ago
  Last activity: 10 minutes ago
```

## Depends On
- State persistence task (for load/isProcessed functions)","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:33.175735-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.111321-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.111321-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.2","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:33.176337-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.2","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:37:11.943944-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4","title":"Targeted Sampling Options","description":"Filter sampled sessions by workspace, agent, time, and depth.

## New Options
Scope: --workspace, --agent, --category
Depth: --quick (5 sessions), --deep (30 sessions)
Time: --days, --since, --before

## Use Cases
- Focus on specific project: --workspace /path/to/project
- Learn from specific agent: --agent claude
- Quick bootstrap: --quick
- Thorough analysis: --deep
- Recent patterns: --days 30

## Acceptance Criteria
- All filters work independently and can be combined
- Filters passed through to cass search where possible
- JSON output includes applied filters","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:34:52.010278-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.437392-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.437392-05:00","labels":["filtering","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:34:52.010929-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4.1","title":"Add scope filters to sampling","description":"Add --workspace, --agent, and --category filters to --sample.

## New Options
--workspace <path>  Filter to sessions from this workspace
--agent <name>      Filter to sessions from this agent (claude, cursor, etc)
--category <cat>    Filter to sessions likely about this category

## Implementation
1. --workspace: Pass through to cass search --workspace
2. --agent: Pass through to cass search --agent
3. --category: Add category keywords to search queries

## Category Filter
Uses CATEGORY_KEYWORDS map to generate search terms:
--category testing → search for "test spec mock assert"

## Cass Integration
Check if cass supports these filters, pass through where possible.
For filters cass doesn't support, do post-filtering on results.

## Output
```json
{
  "sessions": [...],
  "filters": {
    "workspace": "/path/to/project",
    "agent": "claude",
    "category": null
  }
}
```

## Files to Modify
- src/cm.ts - Add options
- src/commands/onboard.ts - Implement filtering
- src/cass.ts - Ensure CassSearchOptions supports filters","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":45,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:38.203235-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.11256-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.11256-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:38.203783-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4.2","title":"Add depth modes and time filters","description":"Add --quick, --deep, --days, --since, --before options to --sample.

## Depth Modes
--quick   Sets limit=5, uses broader queries for fast bootstrap
--deep    Sets limit=30, uses more diverse queries for thorough analysis

## Time Filters
--days <n>       Sessions from last N days (passes to cass)
--since <date>   Sessions after this date (ISO8601)
--before <date>  Sessions before this date (ISO8601)

## Implementation
- --quick/--deep: Presets that set limit and query diversity
- --days: Pass to cass search --days
- --since/--before: Convert to days or filter post-search

## Interaction with --limit
If user provides explicit --limit, it overrides --quick/--deep.
--quick --limit 10 → uses limit=10

## Default Behavior
Without flags: limit=10, no time filter (current behavior)

## Files to Modify
- src/cm.ts - Add options
- src/commands/onboard.ts - Implement modes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":30,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:40.441196-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.113007-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:26.113007-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4.2","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.4","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:40.441681-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5","title":"Pre-Add Validation","description":"Validate rules before adding to prevent duplicates and low-quality entries.

## Problem
Without validation, agents can easily add near-duplicate or low-quality rules.

## Validation Checks
1. Similarity: Warn if >0.8 similar to existing rule
2. Quality: Too short (<10 words), too long (>100 words), missing context
3. Category: Suggest better category if mismatch detected

## Design Decision
Non-blocking by default. --check shows results, --strict fails on warnings.

## Acceptance Criteria
- --check flag shows validation results
- --strict fails on warnings
- Works with --file batch add
- JSON output includes validation details","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:06.084646-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:06.084646-05:00","labels":["onboard-v2","quality"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:06.08522-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5.1","title":"Implement similarity and quality checks","description":"Create validation function for rule quality and duplicate detection.

## CONSTRAINT: Lightweight Similarity - ALREADY SATISFIED
The codebase already uses Xenova/transformers with all-MiniLM-L6-v2:
- ~23MB local model (one-time download)
- Runs on CPU (no GPU required)
- No external API calls
- Cached for offline use

We will REUSE this existing infrastructure via cm similar / findSimilarBulletsSemantic.

## Function Signature
validateRule(content: string, category: string, playbook: Playbook): ValidationResult

## ValidationResult Structure
```typescript
interface ValidationResult {
  valid: boolean;
  warnings: Array<{
    type: 'similarity' | 'quality' | 'category';
    message: string;
    severity: 'error' | 'warning' | 'suggestion';
    details?: any;
  }>;
  suggestions: {
    category?: string;
    reason?: string;
  };
}
```

## Checks to Implement

### 1. Similarity Check
- Use existing findSimilarBulletsSemantic from semantic.ts
- Threshold: > 0.8 triggers warning
- Return: matching rule ID and score

### 2. Quality Heuristics (Simple string checks)
- Too short: < 10 words → warning
- Too long: > 100 words → suggestion to split
- Missing context: No "when", "if", "before", "after", "always", "never" → suggestion
- Too vague: Contains only generic words → warning

### 3. Category Check (Keyword-based)
- Match content keywords against CATEGORY_KEYWORDS
- Pure keyword matching
- If detected category differs from provided, suggest alternative

## Files to Create/Modify
- src/rule-validation.ts (new) - Validation functions
- src/commands/playbook.ts - Import and use","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":60,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:41.576663-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T10:39:11.545997-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:36:41.577218-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.5.2","title":"Add --check and --strict flags","description":"Add validation flags to playbook add command.

## --check Flag
Shows validation results before adding:
```
Validation Results:
  ✓ No similar rules found (highest: 0.45)
  ⚠ Consider adding context: when does this apply?
  
Adding rule...
Added: b-xxx123
```

In JSON mode:
```json
{
  "validation": {...},
  "added": {"id": "b-xxx", ...}
}
```

## --strict Flag
Combined with --check, fails if any warnings:
- Exit code 1
- Rule NOT added
- Clear error message

## Behavior Matrix
| Flags | Warnings Present | Result |
|-------|-----------------|--------|
| (none) | - | Add silently |
| --check | No | Add, show validation |
| --check | Yes | Add, show warnings |
| --check --strict | No | Add, show validation |
| --check --strict | Yes | FAIL, don't add |

## Batch Add Integration
With --file:
- --check validates each rule, shows results
- --strict skips rules with warnings, adds others
- Summary shows validated/skipped counts

## Files to Modify
- src/cm.ts - Add flags
- src/commands/playbook.ts - Integrate validation

## Depends On

 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6","title":"Enhanced Read Output (Template)","description":"Provide contextual guidance when reading sessions with --template flag.

## Problem
cm onboard --read dumps raw content. Agent must figure out context alone.

## Solution
--template flag enriches output with:
- Session metadata (agent, workspace, message count)
- Topic hints (detected from content)
- Related existing rules (similarity search)
- Playbook gaps (from gap analysis)
- Suggested extraction focus

## Acceptance Criteria
- --read --template returns enriched JSON
- Related rules found via similarity search
- Gaps included from gap analysis
- Human-readable and JSON output modes","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:08.0235-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.437848-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:31.437848-05:00","labels":["onboard-v2","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:35:08.023987-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6.1","title":"Add --template flag to read command","description":"Enhance --read with --template flag for contextual extraction guidance.

## CONSTRAINT: Lightweight Similarity - ALREADY SATISFIED
Uses existing local Xenova/transformers model (23MB, CPU, no external APIs).

## Command
cm onboard --read <path> --template --json

## Output Structure
```json
{
  "metadata": {
    "path": "/path/session.jsonl",
    "agent": "claude",
    "workspace": "/Users/x/project",
    "messageCount": 45,
    "topicHints": ["authentication", "API", "error handling"]
  },
  "context": {
    "relatedRules": [
      {"id": "b-abc", "content": "...", "similarity": 0.6}
    ],
    "playbookGaps": {
      "critical": ["security"],
      "underrepresented": ["testing"]
    },
    "suggestedFocus": "Look for error handling and API patterns"
  },
  "extractionFormat": {
    "schema": {"content": "string", "category": "string"},
    "categories": ["debugging", "testing", ...]
  },
  "sessionContent": "..."
}
```

## Topic Detection (Keyword-based)
1. Extract words from first ~10 messages
2. Match against CATEGORY_KEYWORDS
3. Return top 3-5 matching categories

## Related Rules
1. Create snippet from session (first few messages)
2. Use findSimilarBulletsSemantic from semantic.ts
3. Return top 5 matches with score > 0.3

## Note on Semantic Search
If semanticSearchEnabled is false in config, skip related rules section.
This is fine - related rules are "nice to have", not critical.

## Depends On
- Gap analysis function

## Files to Modify
- src/cm.ts - Add --template option
- src/commands/onboard.ts - Implement template generation","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","estimated_minutes":75,"created_at":"2025-12-15T10:37:03.230924-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:09.477324-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-15T11:04:09.477324-05:00","labels":["implementation","onboard-v2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:37:03.231774-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.6.1","depends_on_id":"cass_memory_system-hb4y.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-15T10:37:12.251496-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
